author: Netflix Anime
text:
THE Right and Left #DaemonsoftheShadowRealm
A fated meeting between Yuru and his Daemons: Right and Left.

Daemons of the Shadow Realm comes worldwide July 4 on Netflix, with 
new episodes weekly!

Multiple dubs available.
https://www.netflix.com/title/82719204

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/33okaL0

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

THE Right and Left #DaemonsoftheShadowRealm
https://www.youtube.com/@netflixanime

Yuru, a young hunter in the mountains, lives a humble life with his twin sister Asa and their village — until a "dragon's roar" shatters their peace.
